<?php declare(strict_types = 1); /* * This file is part of PharIo\Manifest. * * Copyright (c) Arne Blankerts <arne@blankerts.de>, Sebastian Heuer <sebastian@phpeople.de>, Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> and contributors * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * */ namespace PharIo\Manifest; class PhpExtensionRequirement implements Requirement { /** @var string */ private $extension; public function __construct(string $extension) { $this->extension = $extension; } public function asString(): string { return $this->extension; } }
